observations.archetype_gloss: Ancient boundary enforcer between realms of living and dead
observations.summary: Dagon represents the Shadow archetype as an ancient, powerful force enforcing boundaries between the living and the dead, embodying restraint rather than impotence.

evidence.quote: My temple fell not for want of strength, boy. There exist boundaries—ancient lines that must not be transgressed. The realm of the living cannot trespass too far into the realm of the dead. We are bound by different laws. Mistake not my ancient restraint for impotence.

accepted_observations.summary: Dagon represents the Shadow archetype as an ancient, powerful force enforcing boundaries between the living and the dead, embodying restraint rather than impotence.

evidence.quote: My temple fell not for want of strength, boy. There exist boundaries—ancient lines that must not be transgressed. The realm of the living cannot trespass too far into the realm of the dead. We are bound by different laws. Mistake not my ancient restraint for impotence.
